scripts.format:backend: prettier --write apps/api apps/worker packages/domain packages/application packages/database packages/openai docs/BACKEND_ARCHITECTURE.md docs/RUNTIME_AGENTS.md docs/OPENAI_INTEGRATION.md
scripts.format:check:backend: prettier --check apps/api apps/worker packages/domain packages/application packages/database packages/openai docs/BACKEND_ARCHITECTURE.md docs/RUNTIME_AGENTS.md docs/OPENAI_INTEGRATION.md
scripts.lint:backend: eslint apps/api apps/worker packages/domain packages/application packages/database packages/openai --max-warnings 0
scripts.test:backend: vitest run apps/api/test apps/worker packages/domain packages/application packages/database packages/openai
scripts.verify:backend: pnpm format:check:backend && pnpm lint:backend && pnpm typecheck:backend && pnpm test:backend && pnpm build:backend
scripts.verify: pnpm test:frontend && pnpm build && pnpm verify:backend
